ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the artwork */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the artwork (e.g., painting, sculpture) */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Style of the artwork (e.g., Renaissance, Impressionist) */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Period during which the artwork was created */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the artwork was created */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium used to create the artwork */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the artwork */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the artwork (e.g., height, width, depth) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the artwork */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the artwork */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Physical location of the artwork */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the artwork was acquired by the museum */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method by which the artwork was acquired */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Provenance of the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the artist */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* Notable works by the artist */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the artist */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Influences on the artist's work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., painting, sculpture) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., Renaissance, Impressionist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., 16th century, 19th century) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "climate_control" TEXT /* Information about climate control in the location */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restoration_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork being restored or conserved */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the restoration activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the conservator who performed the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restoration_activities_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restoration_activities_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork being exhibited */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exhibition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exhibition */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the exhibition is being held */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curator responsible for the exhibition */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the exhibition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the exhibition */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors to the exhibition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, conservator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the artwork */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the artwork was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the artwork */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
